changes.before: Two Greenlight America pending records had truncated descriptions (142, 174 chars) and no salary data despite live pages showing Salary $75,000 - $100,000.
changes.after: Descriptions enriched to full page text (5615, 6286 chars). Salary parsed: $75k-$100k yearly USD, salary_visible=true.
changes.fix: Extended enrichment to custom career pages. Generic format "Salary $75,000 - $100,000" without colon already handled by existing regex (salary:? pattern at job-normalizer.js:1716). Parser confidence: high.
changes.test: Greenlight "Salary $75,000 - $100,000" → salary_min=75000, salary_max=100000, currency=USD, period=yearly, visible=true
